series_metadata.series_description: Record Series Title: Agency Web Pages - Record Series. Description: These websites contain information made available to the public via the Internet as a matter of convenience. Records in this series may include, but are not limited to, general descriptive information about the board, frequently asked questions, rules of practice and procedure, bulletins and sample forms, weekly announcements, interim orders and decisions, annual reports, and meeting schedules. Hard copies of this information are maintained by the BTA board under separate retention schedules. Media Type: Machine readable/electronic. Retention Period: Retain online until content information is obsolete, replaced, or superseded. After the content information is obsolete, replaced, and/or superseded, a snapshot of the web page will then be captured and maintained offline for three months. Retention justification: These websites contain information made available to the public via the Internet as a matter of convenience. There exists administrative and legal value in capturing a periodic snapshot of the webpage in order to document what information was made available to the public when it was presented online. Method of disposal: Delete or erase.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until obsolete, replaced, and/or superseded for three months., Electronic: Delete
